title: Cooketh Flow
excerpt: An open-source visual thinking and unified productivity tool — brainstorm, sketch, and organize ideas effortlessly, solo or as a team.

title: Jotit
excerpt: Jotit is a sleek and efficient full-stack web application designed for seamless note-taking. Built with a powerful and modern technology stack, it allows users to effortlessly create, update, and delete notes. This project demonstrates robust backend development and a dynamic frontend, all while ensuring security through features like rate limiting

title: Store API
excerpt: A simple store api enabling all kinds of request to add stores, items, fetch, delete and update them.

title: Votely
excerpt: Votely is an open-source voting application designed for small-scale elections or demos. With a responsive Flutter web frontend and a robust Python backend, Votely offers a seamless experience for adding candidates, casting votes, and viewing live results.

title: Csnake
excerpt: A cross-code translator designed to map C language code into Python, facilitating seamless code migration and interoperability between these two popular programming languages.

title: Modifiable Progress Indicators
excerpt: A Flutter package that let's you create beautiful modifiable progress indicators.

title: NoteX
excerpt: An open source easy-to-use social media application to study, share resources, connect with each other, find opportunities and grow. A single platform to cater to all the needs of a student.

title: Maitri
excerpt: An assistance app for visually impaired people in their day-to-day life. "Maitrī" goes beyond conventional assistance apps for the visually impaired by incorporating real-time analysis into its array of capabilities.

title: MindSpace - Web
excerpt: MindSpace is a web app that aims to improve access to mental health resources and support, particularly for those who may not have the means or ability to attend in-person appointments.

title: Annapurna
excerpt: A simple meals app using Firebase for authentication and cloud storage to store user data

title: CLI Letter
excerpt: A cli letter for your siginificant one

title: Restaurant Basic-Restaurant-Management-and-Billing-System
excerpt: This is a basic restaurant management and billing system in C programming language, this is our project for first semester in computer science

title: Angular Weather App
excerpt: A Weather application that gives you information about the weather of a city you enter. You can have info about current weather as well as forecast for five days
